name: PixLinks
author: Poki
description: PixLinks is a puzzle game that challenges you to connect tiles with similar themes to solve the puzzles! Think about eyes, ears, nose, and mouth—what do they all have in common? They’re all parts of a face! Or how about a clock and an hourglass? Both are all about time. With tons of fun themes and cute pictures to explore, you’ll face all kinds of exciting challenges. Can you link all the tiles in one go and become a PixLinks master? How to play PixLinks? Click to select a tile. Choose a set of 4 tiles with similar themes. Who created PixLinks? PixLinks is created by Dekovir. Play their other games on Poki: This is their first game on Poki! How can I play PixLinks for free? You can play PixLinks for free on Poki. Can I play PixLinks on mobile devices and desktop? PixLinks can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
